title: ADOLESCENT RECOVERY PROGRAM - 211info
text: WEST EUGENE ADOLESCENT RECOVERY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient substance abuse treatment for youth and their families. Services are provided in Eugene, Cottage Grove, Junction City, and Veneta. 260 E 11th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Ages 11-21 and their families Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 484-7212 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 484-7212 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurance DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Adolescents Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - RESOURCE PANTRY MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COUNSELING PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WEST EUGENE
